title: Nyíregyháza, Szabolcs-Szatmár-Bereg — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nyíregyháza, Szabolcs-Szatmár-Bereg: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nyíregyháza is a city in Szabolcs-Szatmár-Bereg with a population of 116,554. The largest city in northeastern Hungary, a regional economic and cultural center known for its Sóstó thermal baths and the Nyíregyháza Zoo.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
